name: codex-uplift-kit
description: Reusable Codex skills for auditable project onboarding, audit artifacts, delegation contracts, and retrospectives.

interface.shortDescription: Auditability and delegation workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Reusable skills for creating evidence-backed AGENTS.md files, durable audit artifacts, bounded subagent delegation contracts, and retrospective instruction updates.
defaultPrompt: Use codex-project-agents-init to draft AGENTS.md for this repo.
Use codex-delegation-contract to split this audit across bounded subagents.
